title.zh: 社長 · 前社長 · 下屆社長

role.zh: 創社社長 · 社訓練師 · 新社員教育主委
role.en: Charter President · Club Trainer · New Member Education Chair

theme.zh: 建立永力扶輪社，把「社友的職業服務被看見」變成這個社存在的核心目的。台灣好夥伴志業 執行長 / 樂農生活志業 創辦人兼執行長。
theme.en: Founded the Club, making "the vocational service of Members being seen" the core purpose of this club's existence. CEO of Taiwan Good Partner Enterprise / Founder and CEO of Lenong Living Enterprise.

role.zh: PP 前社長 · 副社長 · 社員主委
role.en: Past President · Vice President · Membership Chair

theme.zh: 把短期成果變成可被印刷、可被收藏、可被反覆翻閱的形式。奇桔數位行銷 執行長。
theme.en: Turning short-term results into a form that can be printed, collected, and re-read again and again. CEO of Qiju Digital Marketing.

role.zh: PP 前社長 · 扶輪基金主委
role.en: Past President · Rotary Foundation Chair

theme.zh: 保險與風險管理｜國泰人壽 行銷總監｜財稅規劃。
theme.en: Insurance and risk management | Marketing Director, Cathay Life Insurance | Tax and financial planning.

role.zh: PP 前社長 · 財務長
role.en: Past President · Treasurer

theme.zh: 三十多年陪伴心智障礙青年走進職場、走進社區，讓他們有角色、有貢獻、有尊嚴。育成社會福利基金會 執行長。
theme.en: For more than thirty years, accompanying young people with intellectual disabilities into the workplace and the community, giving them roles, contributions, and dignity. CEO of the Yucheng Social Welfare Foundation.

role.zh: PE 社長當選人 · 代理秘書
role.en: President-Elect · Acting Secretary

theme.zh: 在創社初期承接下一棒，因為相信永力社的方向值得被推下去。全人健康&ESG 顧問服務 / 護全禪心國際 產品主任。
theme.en: Took up the next term in the Club's founding period, because he believes the Club's direction is worth carrying forward. Holistic Health and ESG Consulting Services / Product Director, Huquan Chanxin International.

role.zh: 社區服務主委 · 旅學女力
role.en: Community Service Chair · Travel-Learning Women's Power

theme.zh: 把職業服務做好，就同時是社會服務。讓二度就業婦女成為導覽員；與淡水國中合作旅學 PBL 教案，與淡江大學合作帶領學生進行社會影響力評估。旅學堂工作室 創辦人 / 新北市社區旅學關懷協會 理事長。
theme.en: Doing vocational service well is, at the same time, social service. She helps women re-entering employment become tour guides; collaborates with Tamsui Junior High School on travel-learning PBL lesson plans; and works with Tamkang University to lead students in social impact assessment. Founder of Lxuetang Studio / Chairperson of the New Taipei City Community Travel-Learning Care Association.

role.zh: ESG 永續報告書推動小組 · 國際服務計畫主委
role.en: ESG Sustainability Report Working Group · International Service Project Chair

theme.zh: 把零廢棄、淨灘、海洋永續從理念變成日常行動，帶上百位志工換來真實改變。自由業 / 永續百行。
theme.en: Turning zero waste, beach cleanups, and ocean sustainability from ideas into daily action, bringing hundreds of volunteers together for real change. Freelancer / Sustainable Baixing.

role.zh: 公勝保險經紀人 南安普敦事業部
role.en: Gong Sheng Insurance Brokers, Southampton Division

theme.zh: 用財商思維，為家庭建立永續的防禦率。
theme.en: Using financial-intelligence thinking to build a sustainable defense rate for families.

role.zh: 服務計畫主委 · 通用閣 閣主
role.en: Service Project Chair · Master of Tongyong Ge

theme.zh: 用空間設計回應高齡照顧、生命教育、創新教育訓練。通用閣室內裝修 閣主。
theme.en: Using spatial design to respond to elderly care, life education, and innovative education and training. Master of Tongyong Ge Interior Renovation.

role.zh: 世華音響視聽館 負責人
role.en: Owner of Shihua Audio-Visual Hall

theme.zh: 修隨身聽起家近 40 年，自創 HS-audio 純音工坊。
theme.en: Started by repairing personal stereos nearly 40 years ago, and founded HS-audio, a pure-sound workshop.

role.zh: ESG 永續報告書推動小組 · 引導師
role.en: ESG Sustainability Report Working Group · Facilitator

theme.zh: 用引導技術、SROI、ESG 的方法論，把社區、企業、社友之間的對話接起來。朝邦文教基金會 董事暨引導師。
theme.en: Using facilitation techniques, SROI, and ESG methodologies to connect the dialogue among communities, enterprises, and Members. Director and Facilitator, Chaopang Cultural and Educational Foundation.

role.zh: 智信資訊 總經理
role.en: General Manager, Zhixin Information

theme.zh: 把社務、知識、服務計畫的資料，放進一套可被檢視、可被傳承的系統裡。
theme.en: Putting the data of Club affairs, knowledge, and service projects into a system that can be reviewed and passed on.

role.zh: 聯誼活動主委 · 磐石保險業務協理
role.en: Social Activities Chair · Associate Manager, Panshi Insurance

theme.zh: 保險業 30 年輔導夥伴，創立喜樂樂團讓音樂成為心靈支持。磐石保險經紀人 業務協理。
theme.en: A guiding partner in the insurance industry for 30 years, who founded the Joyful Orchestra to make music a source of spiritual support. Associate Manager, Panshi Insurance Brokers.

role.zh: 通用閣室內裝修股份有限公司 / 行政
role.en: Tongyong Ge Interior Renovation Co., Ltd. / Administration

desc.zh: 台北永續影響力共融衛星社｜2025 年 11 月創社，Irene 擔任創社主席。
desc.en: Taipei Sustainable Impact Inclusive Satellite Club | Founded November 2025, with Irene as charter chair.

role.zh: 衛星社 主席 · 魚籃文化 執行長
role.en: Satellite Club Chair · CEO of Yulan Culture

theme.zh: 用敘事留住地方與信仰的歷史；永力社創社秘書、衛星社創社主席。
theme.en: Using narrative to preserve the history of place and faith; charter secretary of the Club and charter chair of the satellite club.

role.zh: 衛星社 秘書 · 台灣老母雞協會 秘書長
role.en: Satellite Club Secretary · Secretary-General of the Taiwan Old Mother Hen Association

theme.zh: 在尼泊爾建立本地 NGO，讓教育、婦女培力、弱勢關懷成為永續運作的力量。
theme.en: Established a local NGO in Nepal, making education, women's empowerment, and care for the disadvantaged a force for sustainable operation.

role.zh: Drama Action 執行長
role.en: CEO of Drama Action

theme.zh: 以戲劇教育培訓提升人物質素，建立美好生命共榮圈。
theme.en: Using drama education and training to raise the quality of people and build a circle of flourishing for a good life.

role.zh: 琢色映像工作室 共同負責人
role.en: Co-Owner of Zhuose Image Studio

theme.zh: 用媒體轉譯善的影響力，從廣告、MV、Podcast 到永續策劃。
theme.en: Using media to translate the impact of goodness, from advertising, MVs, and podcasts to sustainability planning.

role.zh: 精浚科技 協理
role.en: Associate Manager, Jingjun Technology

theme.zh: 以光機電整合，推動國產醫材與檢測設備的自主化。
theme.en: Using optomechatronic integration to advance the localization of domestically made medical devices and testing equipment.

role.zh: 台灣願景發展 · 應用戲劇繪本芽
role.en: Taiwan Vision Development · Applied Drama Picture-Book Sprout

theme.zh: 跨戲劇、企管與兒家領域，以自然藝術橋梁建設具溫度和韌性的永續方案。
theme.en: Bridging drama, business management, and the children-and-family field, using nature and art as a bridge to build warm and resilient sustainability solutions.
